entry.title: Petit&Jolie Massage Oil 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Lotion
Price: 9.90

Petit&Jolie Massage Oil nourishes and protects the skin and is very suitable for a baby massage, a nice relaxing moment for both of you. The ultra-soft oil consists of a combination of organically grown sunflower, jojoba and almond oils.

The massage oil is 100% from natural ingredients and contains no paraffin or synthetic fragrances and dyes.

The massage oil is also suitable as a skin oil (for all ages)

How to use: Pour a few drops of oil onto the palms of your (warm) hands and then gentle massage onto the skin of your baby.

Ingredients: Helianthus Annuus Hybrid Oil* (sunflower), Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil* (jojoba), Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil* (almond), Schizandra Sphenanthera Fruit Extract, Tocopherol (vitamin E), Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil (sunflower), Vanilla Planifolia Fruit Extract (vanilla), Parfum*

* organic source  

** natural essential oils

entry.title: LUUV Shimmering Carrot Dry Oil Bronze 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Lotion
Price: 20.00

Bronze, shimmering skin is just within reach! LUUV Shimmering Carrot Dry Oil is an aloe-based, richly moisturizing vitamin bomb that gives the skin an eye-catching, beautiful gleam. The carrot oil, rich in vitamin A and beta-carotene, makes the skin beautifully radiant without a self-tanning effect.

The antioxidants and vitamin E in carrot oil help maintain the skin’s youthful appearance, while aloe soothes and deeply moisturizes the skin, helping to maintain its moisture level. The skin remains silky soft, elastic, vibrant, and radiant. The dry oil contains light-reflecting mica particles that gently shimmer and are safe for both the skin and the environment. It is ideal for all skin types, does not clog pores, and is suitable for daily use. The gel-like texture of the dry oil glides effortlessly over the skin, absorbs quickly, and does not leave the skin sticky or greasy.

  • Deeply moisturizes
  • Improves skin elasticity
  • Enhances complexion
  • Gel-like texture
  • Absorbs quickly
  • Washable sparkle
  • Suitable for all skin types
  • Natural SPF 10

Key ingredients: 

  • Carrot oil (specifically carrot seed oil) contains a lot of carotene, which gives a complexion-enhancing effect. Carrot oil is always in a carrier oil (i.e., diluted) because it is too intense on its own. It contains a lot of vitamin A. The natural SPF of carrot oil is around 40, but since it is diluted, it ends up around SPF 10.
  • Aloe has been used in folk medicine for centuries. Aloe is an excellent moisturizer and soothes irritations, making it great for sunburn relief. Aloe has a calming effect and carries oxygen to the skin, leaving it silky and soft.
  • Orange essential oil is primarily used to scent the product with a fresh, sweet citrus aroma. Essential oils can penetrate the skin and provide an immediate mood-lifting, energizing feeling. Citrus oils are suitable for brightening the skin.
  • We use caramel for coloring (in self-tanning mousse and bronze dry oil). It is a 100% natural colorant with a pleasant caramel aroma, making it an eco-friendly choice.

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Shake the bottle before use. Apply an appropriate amount of the product to clean skin.

Ingredients: Aqua, Dunaliella Salina Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Citrus Nobilis (Mandarin) Peel Oil, Citrus Aurantium (Orange) Peel Oil, Xanthan Gum, Triethyl Citrate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Benzoic Acid, Mica, Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), Raphanus Sativus (Radish) Root Extract, Citric Acid, Maltodextrin, Parfum, Citral, Limonene, Linalool

entry.title: LUUV Natural Carrot Dry Oil with Aloe Vera 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Foot Cream
Price: 19.00

Natural radiant complexion without sunbathing or self-tanners? Yes, with LUUV Carrot Dry Oil, it’s possible! This dry oil is a natural vitamin bomb that deeply moisturizes your skin and restores its radiance and elasticity. The vitamin A and beta-carotene in carrot oil give your skin a beautiful healthy glow without tanning it. The dry oil is also rich in antioxidants and vitamin E, which help maintain youthful skin. Aloe has a soothing effect and provides long-lasting hydration.

The dry oil has a gel-like texture that is easily spreadable, absorbs quickly, and doesn’t leave the skin greasy or sticky. Its pleasant citrusy scent is refreshing and relaxing. LUUV Carrot Dry Oil is designed for all skin types, it doesn’t clog pores, and is great for everyday skincare. LUUV Carrot Dry Oil with aloe is natural, vegan, and contains only good ingredients.

  • Deeply hydrating 
  • Improves skin elasticity
  • Improves complexion
  • Absorbs quickly 
  • Non-greasy finish
  • For all skin types
  • Natural SPF10

Key ingredients: 

  • Carrot oil (specifically carrot seed oil) contains a lot of carotene, which gives a complexion-enhancing effect. Carrot oil is always in a carrier oil (i.e., diluted) because it is too intense on its own. It contains a lot of vitamin A. The natural SPF of carrot oil is around 40, but since it is diluted, it ends up around SPF 10.
  • Aloe has been used in folk medicine for centuries. Aloe is an excellent moisturizer and soothes irritations, making it great for sunburn relief. Aloe has a calming effect and carries oxygen to the skin, leaving it silky and soft.
  • Orange essential oil is primarily used to scent the product with a fresh, sweet citrus aroma. Essential oils can penetrate the skin and provide an immediate mood-lifting, energizing feeling. Citrus oils are suitable for brightening the skin.

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply a suitable amount of the product to clean skin. Suitable for daily use on all skin types.

Ingredients: Aqua, Dunaliella Salina Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Citrus Reticulata (Mandarin Oil), Citrus Sinensis (Orange Oil), Xanthan Gum, Triethyl Citrate, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Citric Acid, Benzoic Acid, Parfum, Citral, Limonene, Linalool

entry.title: NURME Calming Baby Oil 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Lotion
Price: 11.50

Almond oil gets absorbed faster in the skin which prevents dryness of skin and keeps your baby’s skin soft and moisturised. Use almond oil or baby oil for a daily massage, or applying it topically to dry patches. Very effective in treating cradle cap as it is a lighter oil that will soften scaly skin without damaging delicate new skin. Best known protection against diaper rash.

How to use: Use daily for massages or use only on dry spots. Can also be used in bath water. Very effective in treating cradle cap. Massage gently on baby's head, leave it be for a little while and then brush off very gently.

Ingredients: Prunus Amygdalis Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil*.
*Organic

entry.title: NAIF Soothing Baby Oil for Baby & Kids 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Lotion
Price: 14.90

A nice oil that nourishes the skin, absorbs quickly and is not sticky. Use it to create a warm bonding moment with your baby during a massage. Nourishes and hydrates sensitive baby skin after bath time.

By adding sunflower seed oil and cottonseed oil the Naïf Baby Oil helps to lock in moisture post-bath time, so the skin doesn’t get dry and the natural protective layer of your baby’s skin stays intact. 

How to use: Use a few drops on the skin or in the hand and gently massage the oil in circular motions. Absorbs quickly.

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Parfum/fragrance, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Gossypium (Cotton Seed) Oil, Bisabolol

entry.title: Magrada 5in1 Beauty Oil with Lavender 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Lotion
Price: 19.90

The nightly beauty ritual will create a spa-like pleasure in the comfort of your home. The organic body oil will provide a relaxing pleasure for your body and senses. The composition of the naturally extracted essential oils from small organic producers alleviates tensions and facilitates falling asleep.

  • Cold-pressed organic safflower oil restores and preserves the moisture level of the skin.
  • Organic apricot kernel oil with its light structure nurtures the skin with minerals and vitamins A, B, C, and E.
  • Organic jojoba oil contains vitamins A and E and has wonderful tightening properties.

Aroma therapy is based on natural extracted essences which balance our senses, body, and skin. Natural scents also have a positive impact on our well-being.

The main features of the oil: calms, relaxes, improves your mood, alleviates anxiety, facilitates falling asleep.

  • Provence – one of the most beautiful areas of France with violet lavender fields which only give the best organic lavender essential oil.
  • Cold-pressed organic white grapefruit essential oil adds sunny synergy.
  • Organic juniper essential oil has a relaxing and calming effect.

How to use: Rub the oil on dry or damp skin, massage uniformly. To relieve tensions, dab the oil on your temples and in the nose area.

Ingredients: Carthamus Tinctorius (Safflower) Seed Oil*, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil*, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Peel Oil*, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Oil*, Juniperus Communis (Juniper) Fruit Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Linalool, Limonene

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 100%

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | alcohol-free | vegan | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Golden Body Shimmer With Carrot Extract 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Body Serum
Price: 23.30

Get a golden glow in seconds! You are looking at your new go-to product for achieving radiant skin. The oil-free gel absorbs in seconds and gives the skin a golden radiance.

Natural minerals (golden and bronze) and extracts from St. John’s wort, carrot, and aloe leave the skin radiant and moisturised to perfection. The scent of the gel is inspired by the freshness of the sea and the gentle summer wind. The several-good-things-in-one product absorbs fast and has a light consistency, leaving the skin pleasantly silky. The glow effect is perfect for important events as well as a sunny summer day.

  • A wonderful plant with medicinal properties called St. John’s wort calms irritation. St. John’s wort extract is perfect for sensitive skin and has a cleansing and anti-microbial effect.
  • Carrot root extract helps to achieve a great tan and makes it last longer.
  • Aloe extract promotes the healing of wounds, moisturises, has refreshing and anti-inflammatory properties, is calming, alleviates irritation, and protects the skin.

How to use: Using the shimmer gel is super easy: gently apply the product to clean skin. Don’t worry – it won’t stain your clothes. You can use the gel on the body, décolletage and face. The glow is perfect for evening events and sunny weather.

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Xanthan Gum, Daucus Carota Sativa (Carrot) Root Extract, Hypericum Perforatum Extract, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Extract, Panthenol, Parfum, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate, Mica, CI 77891, CI 77491.

Ingredients of natural origin: 95,89%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Carrot Oil With Rosemary Extract 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Tanning Oil & Lotion
Price: 14.20

Based on the power of the rich vitamin content of carrots, we have created a face and body oil which is ideal for daily care with its minimalistic formula. The carrot elixir will prepare your skin for the sunny season and for sunbathing.

The composition brings together sunflower seed oil and the powerful extracts of carrot root and rosemary. The product helps the tan to last longer, accelerates the processes of tanning, and keeps the skin moisturised. The golden colour of the carrot oil also adds a golden finish to the skin.

  • Carrot root extract facilitates tanning and helps the sunny complexion to last longer.
  • Rosemary extract is a great anti-inflammatory antioxidant which is also suitable for sensitive and delicate skin.
  • Sunflower seed oil is an incredibly rich source of natural vitamin E and essential fatty acids – omega-6 and omega-9. The light, nurturing oil is ideal for moisturising, calming, and restoring the skin, and also helps to improve your complexion.

The oil is made of the roots of organic carrots which are harvested from June to October. Carrot roots are soaked in sunflower seed oil, which gives the product its yellowish orange colour. This, in turn, gives the sunbathing elixir its high beta carotene and vitamin concentration.

How to use: Start using the oil a few weeks before going on a holiday in the south or before the beginning of the beach season. Apply it on clean skin in the evening – this will help the elixir to absorb best and make it as beneficial as possible for the skin. Continue using the product every day during the sunbathing period. Use the oil after having spent time in the sun to make the complexion last longer and preserve the tan longer. Always use sunscreen before going out on a sunny day or sunbathing, as the oil does not contain any UV filters. The product will not stain your clothing.

Ingredients: Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil*, Daucus Carota Sativa (Carrot) Root Extract*, Rosemary (Rosmarinus Officinalis) Leaf Extract*

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 100%. Ingredients of organic origin: 100%. 

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | fragrance-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients
